title: erigeron sionis var. trilobatus
intro: Erigeron sionis var. trilobatus, also known as the Alpine Fleabane, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erigeron sionis var. trilobatus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as a natural antiseptic to prevent infection. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, from skin irritations to respiratory problems.
